title: A minimal file shape with a single governing rule at its center. The file is the .precept artifact — the one source of all rules. The bright band is the precept: the single governing declaration that makes the entity's behavior structurally certain. Everything else (states, events, field definitions) exists to support that rule. One file, one dominant rule.
conceptualBridge: The ruled file means Precept's definition is the one source of all governing behavior because the .precept file contains the rule — every constraint, every transition, every valid state — in one bounded place.
decision: Kept at threshold (4.0): the minimal file form is legible and economical; structural soundness (3 = minimum) is the key weakness — a file icon projects 'document' not 'prevention.' Useful as an alternative direction but won't beat the stronger structural candidates in the set.
